name: Stimcell Energetics Inc.
business: Stimcell Energetics Inc. is a biotech company that develops and commercializes eBalance Technology, a microcurrent therapy device for pain management and wellness. The company's primary products are the eBalance Home System for patient home use and the eBalance Pro System for healthcare professionals. The technology is intended to provide temporary relief of pain and support general wellness.

exposures.sentence: Stimcell Energetics Inc. is a biotech company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of therapeutic and non-therapeutic products that enhance cellular function, promote general wellness and alleviate health complications, including, but not limited to: aging, insulin sensitivity, high blood pressure, neuropathy and kidney function. The Company's primary focus is on continued research and development of its eBalance Technology and its eBalance Home System.

catalysts.event: Partnership with ADM Tronics to redesign eBalance Home device
catalysts.sentence: In February of 2025, the Company established a new partnership with ADM Tronics Unlimited, Inc., a leader in electronic medical device engineering, with an aim to redesign the eBalance Home device into a compact, affordable consumer unit optimized for home use, complete with cutting-edge diagnostic features.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of redesigned eBalance Wellness device
catalysts.sentence: This new streamlined unit is expected to be completed in the fall of 2025 and ready for market in early 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 537 million adults were living with diabetes in 2021, rising to 783 million by 2045.
tamClaims.sentence: According to information published by the International Diabetes Federation (IDF) in its IDF Diabetes Atlas Tenth Edition (2021) (www.diabetesatlas.org), in 2021, approximately 537 million adults (20-79 years) were living with diabetes; by 2045 this will rise to 783 million.
